rounds.pro_tip: Natural imperfections like lens flare, slight blur, or uneven lighting are hallmarks of a real photograph.
Examine text and labels — AI struggles with readable, consistent lettering.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of an inquisitive short-coated tan and black puppy, captured in an extreme close-up, focusing sharply on its adorable face, soulful eyes, and the delicate texture of its nose. Lit with a softbox and reflector to bring out intricate fur details, shot with a macro lens at f/4 on a mirrorless camera, creating a very shallow depth of field.

rounds.pro_tip: Look at reflections — real reflections match the environment, AI reflections are often random.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a fluffy white Shih Tzu puppy in mid-stride, joyfully running across a vibrant green lawn. Captured with a fast shutter speed (1/1250s) and a telephoto lens at f/2.8 to achieve a dynamic shallow focus, isolating the puppy from the beautifully blurred grassy background, under bright, natural outdoor sunlight.

Check for symmetry — AI tends to make things too perfect and symmetrical.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a sweet Golden Retriever puppy, gently resting and lying down on a soft, pristine white knitted textile. Taken with a standard zoom lens at a medium aperture (f/5.6) for balanced focus, bathed in diffused studio lighting to emphasize the puppy's soft golden fur and the cozy texture of the fabric, with a clean, minimalist aesthetic.

rounds.pro_tip: Look for natural imperfections — real photos have dust, slight blur, and uneven lighting.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a short-coated chocolate brown puppy, head turned slightly to the right with bright, alert eyes, captured with selective focus using a full-frame DSLR and a prime lens at f/1.8, under soft natural window light, creating a beautiful bokeh background.

rounds.attribution: Photo by hannah grace on Unsplash
rounds.pro_tip: Natural imperfections like lens flare, slight blur, or uneven lighting are hallmarks of a real photograph.
Check edges carefully — AI often produces halos or unnatural blending where objects meet.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a serene white and tan short-coated puppy, peacefully curled up and lying flat on a warm, polished dark brown wooden floor. Shot at eye level with a standard prime lens, using soft overhead ambient light to showcase its relaxed posture and the natural grain of the wood, with a subtly diffused background.
